# Metrics Collection Guide

Guide to tracking and displaying agent execution metrics.

## Overview

Switchboard tracks execution metrics for all agents, including duration, exit codes, and skill installation statistics. Use the `switchboard metrics` command to view this data.

## Metrics Types

### Execution Metrics

- **Duration** - How long the agent ran
- **Exit code** - Success (0) or error (non-zero)
- **Start time** - When execution began
- **End time** - When execution completed

### Skill Metrics

- **Skills installed** - Number of skills installed for the agent
- **Install duration** - Time spent installing skills
- **Install success/failure** - Whether skills installed successfully

## Viewing Metrics

### CLI Command

```bash
# View all agent metrics
switchboard metrics

# View specific agent
switchboard metrics my-agent

# Detailed output
switchboard metrics --detailed

# Last 7 days
switchboard metrics --period 7d
```

### Output Format

Metrics are displayed in a table format by default:

```
Agent          | Runs | Success | Avg Duration | Last Run
---------------|------|---------|--------------|----------
daily-report   |  30  |   29    |    2m 15s    | 2026-03-06
code-reviewer   |  15  |   14    |    5m 30s    | 2026-03-05
```

### JSON Output

For scripting integration:

```bash
switchboard metrics --format json
```

## Configuration

Metrics are collected automatically for all agents. No additional configuration is required.

## Storage

Metrics are stored in `.switchboard/metrics/` directory. Each agent has its own metrics file in JSON format.
